headline: The Hartford Names Natalie Burns Head Of Enterprise Sales And Distribution
summary: HARTFORD, Conn., April 09, 2026--The Hartford has appointed Natalie Burns head of Enterprise Sales & Distribution, reporting to Tracey Ant, head of Middle & Large Business, effective May 1. In this role, she will be responsible for enhancing relationships with The Hartford’s top distribution partners and working with the company’s Personal and Business Insurance, as well as Employee Benefits sales teams to drive growth across business segments. headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on The Hartford Insurance Gr, Raises Price Target to $160
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Elyse Greenspan   maintains The Hartford Insurance Gr (NYSE:HIG) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $156 to $160.

headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Maintains Overweight on The Hartford Insurance Gr, Lowers Price Target to $160
summary: Cantor Fitzgerald  analyst Ryan Tunis   maintains The Hartford Insurance Gr (NYSE:HIG) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $165 to $160.
